findings.issue: AI controls now include an adversarial uploaded-document prompt-injection regression, and AI output is fail-closed at the claim-gate level. Hosted beta still needs qualified AI safety review of model routing, redaction quality, prompt handling, logging, and incident response before real customer documents or provider calls are used.
findings.required_fix: Have a qualified AI safety reviewer evaluate the prompt injection regression, AI/data policy, model route contracts, redaction previews, manual/no-AI fallback, and hosted provider controls; record any P0/P1 findings before private beta.

proof_boundary: This is an AI-assisted simulated review. It can create fixes or blockers, but it cannot open qualified approval or launch gates.
